GetAllStaff.query:
query GetAllStaff {
  staff(center_number: "3100") {
    edges {
      node {
	address_city
        address_country
        address_line_1
        address_line_2
        address_postal_code
        address_state
        admin_assistant_email
        admin_assistant_phone
        business_title
        center_name
        center_number
        directory_opt_out
        employee_number
        employee_type
        end_date
        first_name
        full_name
        is_active_staff
        is_supervisor
        job_title
        known_as_first
        known_as_last
        last_name
        last_updated
        login_id
        mail_stop
        middle_name
        office_location
        office_location_id
        orcid
        position_type
        position_type
        start_date
        suffix
        supervisor_email
        supervisor_employee_number
        supervisor_name
        work_email
        work_mobile
        work_phone
      }
    }
  }
}
